articles.title: The Strokes condemns US foreign intervention on Coachella stage
articles.summary: The Strokes condemns US foreign intervention on Coachella stage. The Strokes wrapped up their Coachella set Saturday night by using the festival's massive LED screens onstage to voice the rock band’s political protests against American foreign intervention and military action

articles.title: China's smart bet is paying off. Meanwhile, Australia pleads for fuel
articles.summary: China's smart bet is paying off. Meanwhile, Australia pleads for fuel. While the rest of us count the cost in higher fuel costs, higher inflation and a weaker economy, China — the actual winner of the war — will be enjoying a surge of global interest in its solar panels, wind turbines and electric vehicles.
